zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Ferrers於1395年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby23歲，母親Philippa Clifford24歲。他於大約1437年與Elizabeth Freville結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年1月6日享年64歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Ferrers于1395年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾时，他的父亲William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby23岁，母亲Philippa Clifford24岁。他于大约1437年与Elizabeth Freville结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年1月6日享年64岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Ferrers was born in 1395, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, was 23 and his mother, Philippa Clifford, was 24. He married Elizabeth Freville about 1437. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 6 January 1459, at the age of 64, and was buried in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Ferrers est né en 1395, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Philippa Clifford, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Freville environ 1437. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1459, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Ferrers 1395 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby 23 und seine Mutter Philippa Clifford 24. Er hat um 1437 Elizabeth Freville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1459 im Alter von 64 Jahren und wurde in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers è nato il nel 1395 nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Clifford, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Freville circa 1437. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 gennaio 1459, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Tamworth, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrersが1395年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Grobyは23歳，母Philippa Cliffordは24歳であった。約1437年にElizabeth Frevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年1月6日に64歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ferrers(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Clifford(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1437년 Elizabeth Freville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 1월 6일 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ferrers nasceu em 1395, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Clifford, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Freville aproximadamente 1437. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1459, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Ferrers родился в 1395 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Clifford, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Freville около 1437 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 6 января 1459 г. в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Ferrers nació en 1395, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Ferrers 5th Barron Ferrers of Groby, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Philippa Clifford, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Freville aproximadamente 1437. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de enero de 1459, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
